channel.title: Systemcheck on Host os Kicksecure warning
channel.description:
Hey when i run systemcheck in the command line on my new installed kicksecure installation it says “WARNING: Check Virtualizer Result: Virtualizer detection failed”
But everything Is ok I dont understand what the problem could be because It is not a BIOS setting cuz I run kvm/qemu kicksecure vms on linux mint host os for the most of the time… and further more without a problem as linux mint host OS
I swap SSDs on my desktop sometimes for fun like just testing kicksecure out right now!
I have a fully supported intel virtualication CPU with VTX support and nested all that stuff with intel virtualision technology enabled ofc In BIOS as always.

item.title: Systemcheck on Host os Kicksecure warning
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.source: Systemcheck on Host os Kicksecure warning

item.title: Systemcheck on Host os Kicksecure warning
item.dc:creator: whistleblow
item.description:
Hey when i run systemcheck in the command line on my new installed kicksecure installation it says “WARNING: Check Virtualizer Result: Virtualizer detection failed”

But everything Is ok I dont understand what the problem could be because It is not a BIOS setting cuz I run kvm/qemu kicksecure vms on linux mint host os for the most of the time… and further more without a problem as linux mint host OS

I swap SSDs on my desktop sometimes for fun like just testing kicksecure out right now!

I have a fully supported intel virtualication CPU with VTX support and nested all that stuff with intel virtualision technology enabled ofc In BIOS as always.

Read full topic
